quotes.text: So verily, with every difficulty there is relief: Indeed, with every difficulty there is relief.
quotes.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا . إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
quotes.explanation: This verse reminds us that after hardship comes ease, giving hope to those facing difficulties.

quotes.text: The strong person is not the one who can overpower others. Rather, the strong person is the one who controls himself when angry.
quotes.arabic: لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ، إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
quotes.explanation: True strength lies in self-control, especially during anger.

quotes.text: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim.
quotes.arabic: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
quotes.explanation: This hadith emphasizes the importance of seeking knowledge as a religious duty.

quotes.text: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
quotes.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
quotes.explanation: True faith manifests in selfless love and care for others.

quotes.text: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
quotes.explanation: Patience brings divine support and companionship.

quotes.text: The best among you are those who have the best manners and character.
quotes.explanation: Good character is the measure of true excellence.

quotes.text: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
quotes.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
quotes.explanation: Faith should guide our speech towards goodness or silence.

quotes.text: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.
quotes.arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
quotes.explanation: Divine wisdom ensures we are never tested beyond our capacity.

quotes.text: The seeking of knowledge is obligatory for every Muslim.
quotes.arabic: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
quotes.explanation: Knowledge acquisition is a continuous duty for all Muslims.

quotes.text: Paradise is surrounded by hardships, and Hellfire is surrounded by desires.
quotes.arabic: حُفَّتِ الْجَنَّةُ بِالْمَكَارِهِ وَحُفَّتِ النَّارُ بِالشَّهَوَاتِ
quotes.explanation: The path to paradise requires patience through difficulties.
